title: polypogon mollis
intro: Polypogon mollis, also known as common hair grass or soft brome, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Polypogon mollis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
